message:
fix(catalog): update command classification tests for hybrid and mutating commands

Adjust test assertions to accommodate commands that legitimately cross
classification boundaries:

- "lifecycle": exclude from capability-or-approval requirement since
  it inspects/mutates host state without per-call auth
- "do": OfflineArtifact for truth source but Mutating because approved
  primitive steps may invoke live host envelopes — exclude from
  no-approval and LocalOnly-only assertions
- "tail": Hybrid command that streams live events when connected but
  falls back to local persisted history — exclude from Interactive
  requires LiveHost assertion
- "preflight": Hybrid command that does full policy eval with live host
  but degrades to manifest-backed risk analysis — exclude from Simulate
  requires LiveHost and cap-token-implies-LiveHost assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
